2023 NFL Draft

Previous Season Next Season

Super Bowl Champion: Kansas City Chiefs

AP MVP: Lamar Jackson

AP Offensive Rookie of the Year: C.J. Stroud

AP Defensive Rookie of the Year: Will Anderson

AP Offensive Player of the Year: Christian McCaffrey

AP Defensive Player of the Year: Myles Garrett

Passing Leader: Tua Tagovailoa, 4624 Yds

Rushing Leader: Christian McCaffrey, 1459 Yds

Receiving Leader: Tyreek Hill, 1799 Yds
